description_long: This is a small, stylized wooden fence section composed of three thick, cylindrical vertical posts with pointed tops, connected by two horizontal rails. The posts are evenly spaced and the pointed tops give the fence a classic, rustic appearance, reminiscent of traditional picket or palisade fencing. The horizontal rails are flat and rectangular, attached to the posts with visible round fasteners. The wood is uniformly colored in a medium brown, suggesting a stained or painted finish. The construction appears sturdy, with the posts extending slightly above the top rail to emphasize the pointed caps. There are no visible decorative elements or gate mechanisms, making this fence functional and simple in design.
description: A small, brown wooden fence with three pointed posts and two horizontal rails, featuring a simple, rustic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three pointed posts and two horizontal rails, with all fasteners visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the posts and the narrow profile of the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same three posts and rails, with fasteners visible on the rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thickness of the posts and the slimness of the structure.
